sentences.arabic: شَهِدَ الْمَطْبَخُ الْعَرَبِيُّ فِي الْآوِنَةِ الْأَخِيرَةِ تَطَوُّرًا مَلْحُوظًا، حَيْثُ بَدَأَ الطُّهَاةُ بِدَمْجِ النَّكْهَاتِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ مَعَ تِقْنِيَّاتِ الطَّهْيِ الْعَالَمِيَّةِ الْحَدِيثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kuhinja je u posljednje vrijeme doživjela primjetan razvoj, jer su kuhari počeli spajati tradicionalne okuse s modernim svjetskim tehnikama kuhanja.
sentences.translationEn: Arab cuisine has recently witnessed a noticeable development, as chefs have begun merging traditional flavors with modern international cooking techniques.

sentences.arabic: يَبْتَكِرُ الطُّهَاةُ أَطْبَاقًا جَدِيدَةً تَسْتَخْدِمُ الزَّعْفَرَانَ وَمَاءَ الْوَرْدِ فِي صِنَاعَةِ الْحَلَوِيَّاتِ الْغَرْبِيَّةِ، مِمَّا يُضْفِي طَابَعًا شَرْقِيًّا مُمَيَّزًا عَلَى الْمَذَاقِ.
sentences.translation: Kuhari kreiraju nova jela koristeći šafran i ružinu vodicu u izradi zapadnih slastica, što okusu daje prepoznatljiv orijentalni karakter.
sentences.translationEn: Chefs are creating new dishes using saffron and rose water in the making of Western desserts, which adds a distinctive Oriental character to the taste.

sentences.arabic: رَغْمَ هَذَا التَّجْدِيدِ، يَبْقَى الِالْتِزَامُ بِالْمَكَوِّنَاتِ الطَّازَجَةِ وَالذَّبْحِ الْحَلَالِ شَرْطًا أَسَاسِيًّا لَا يُمْكِنُ التَّنَازُلُ عَنْهُ فِي أَيِّ مَطْعَمٍ عَرَبِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Uprkos ovoj inovaciji, posvećenost svježim sastojcima i halal klanju ostaje osnovni uslov od kojeg se ne može odstupiti ni u jednom arapskom restoranu.
sentences.translationEn: Despite this innovation, commitment to fresh ingredients and halal slaughter remains a fundamental condition that cannot be compromised in any Arab restaurant.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاهِمُ هَذِهِ التَّجَارِبُ فِي تَعْرِيفِ الْأَجْيَالِ الشَّابَّةِ بِتُرَاثِهِمْ بِقَالَبٍ عَصْرِيٍّ يَتَنَاسَبُ مَعَ أَذْوَاقِهِمُ الْمُتَنَوِّعَةِ وَمُتَطَلَّبَاتِ الْعَصْرِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi eksperimenti doprinose upoznavanju mlađih generacija s njihovim naslijeđem u modernom obliku koji odgovara njihovim različitim ukusima i zahtjevima vremena.
sentences.translationEn: These experiments contribute to introducing younger generations to their heritage in a modern mold that suits their diverse tastes and the requirements of the era.

sentences.arabic: فِي النِّهَايَةِ، يَظَلُّ الطَّعَامُ لُغَةً عَالَمِيَّةً تَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ الثَّقَافَاتِ وَتُقَرِّبُ بَيْنَ الشُّعُوبِ رَغْمَ اخْتِلَافِ الْمَطَابِخِ وَأَسَالِيبِ التَّحْضِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, hrana ostaje univerzalni jezik koji spaja kulture i približava narode uprkos razlikama u kuhinjama i načinima pripreme.
sentences.translationEn: In the end, food remains a universal language that brings cultures together and draws peoples closer despite the differences in cuisines and preparation methods.
